title: Recovery Decision Matrix

PATH_A1.label: CEO 批准歷史 API + API key 已到位
PATH_A1.trigger_condition: p11_ceo_odds_source_decision = APPROVE_PATH_A_WITH_API_KEY 且 API key 設置完成
PATH_A1.blocker: CEO decision DEFER + API key 不存在
PATH_A1.unblock_condition: CEO 建立 p11_ceo_odds_source_decision_20260527.json 且 ALLOW_SAMPLE_API_CALL=true + key
PATH_A1.next_executable_task: P11-C: API key gate → sample snapshot validate → historical backfill (1800 pairs)

PATH_A2.label: CEO 批准歷史 API 但 API key 未到位
PATH_A2.trigger_condition: p11_ceo_odds_source_decision = APPROVE_PATH_A_WITH_API_KEY 但 key 缺失
PATH_A2.unblock_condition: 提供有效 The Odds API key 並設置 ALLOW_SAMPLE_API_CALL=true
PATH_A2.next_executable_task: 等待 API key 到位；每日監控 key readiness
PATH_A2.estimated_unblock_days: API key 取得後 1 天

PATH_B1.label: Forward accumulation 達到 200 pairs + closing coverage ready
PATH_B1.unblock_condition: TSL 每日收集持續；監控 monitor_forward_collection_readiness_p11.py 回報 CLV_READY_CANDIDATE
PATH_B1.next_executable_task: 每日執行 run_blocked_state_daily_monitor_p12.py → 當 p13_allowed=true 通知 CTO

PATH_B2.label: Forward accumulation 持續不足
PATH_B2.blocker: 無 pregame+closing pairs，TSL 收集尚未開始或資料不足
PATH_B2.unblock_condition: 啟動並維持 TSL 每日收集排程（P10-D manifest）
PATH_B2.next_executable_task: 確認 TSL 每日收集排程已啟動；執行 daily monitor

PATH_C.label: CEO 繼續延遲決策
PATH_C.trigger_condition: CEO decision file 不存在或 decision = DEFER_DECISION
PATH_C.unblock_condition: CEO 建立決策檔案（OPTION A 或 B）
PATH_C.next_executable_task: 持續每日監控；僅允許 CEO_FOLLOWUP + PAPER_ONLY_MONITORING

annotation: paper_only=true。此為 P12-C Recovery Decision Matrix。所有路徑均明確列出 owner、unblock condition 與 forbidden actions。不宣稱任何策略具獲利能力。
